description.ko: 음향 에너지를 시각적으로 탐구하며, 소리의 파동을 유동적이고 빛나는 건축적 형태와 리드미컬한 빛의 패턴으로 변환합니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of acoustic energy, where sound waves are transformed into fluid, glowing architectural forms and rhythmic light patterns.

prompt: Cinematic sound visualization, 3D parametric waves of liquid silver and neon violet, pulsating frequency spectrum, holographic particles floating in a dark void, ripples of light reacting to an invisible beat, macro lens, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, futuristic aesthetic.
